description: Environment setup and baseline verification. Install dependencies, generate Prisma client, confirm lint and build pass on current codebase.
steps: Set dummy environment variables: export DATABASE_URL='postgresql://fake:fake@localhost:5432/fake' and DIRECT_URL='postgresql://fake:fake@localhost:5432/fake'
Run npx prisma generate to create the Prisma client
Run npm run lint to confirm no lint errors
Run npm run build to confirm the project builds successfully
Run npx vitest run to confirm existing tests pass
acceptance_criteria: npm run lint passes with no errors
npx vitest run passes all existing tests
verification: npm run lint exits with code 0
npm run build exits with code 0
npx vitest run shows all tests passing
findings: All steps pass cleanly. npm install adds 563 packages. Lint has one pre-existing console warning in lib/captainLog.js (no-console) but exits 0. Build produces 21 static pages. All 328 tests pass across 17 test files. Node v22, Prisma v5.22.0.
